raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A clear plastic bottle with a white cap stands on a dark table. The bottle is rigid with a cylindrical body and a cap. STRATEGY - reach the bottle body, grasp it, and apply a force to tip it over. Failure mode: if the bottle is not grasped properly, it may not tip. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach bottle body; Step 2 grasp body for secure hold; Step 3 apply force to tip.**
Goal: tipped(blue_plastic_bottle)
Scene: blue_plastic_bottle, table
Step 1: reach(blue_plastic_bottle)
  affordance_region: the body of the blue plastic bottle
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, blue_plastic_bottle, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, blue_plastic_bottle) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(blue_plastic_bottle)
  affordance_region: the body of the blue plastic bottle
  contact: holding(blue_plastic_bottle) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(blue_plastic_bottle)
Step 3: push(blue_plastic_bottle)
  affordance_region: the body of the blue plastic bottle
  contact: pushing(blue_plastic_bottle) [completion]
  direction: push_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: tipped(blue_plastic_bottle)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the blue plastic bottle
the body of the blue plastic bottle
the body of the blue plastic bottle
